decision.reason: Three consecutive expand attempts have not progressed the workflow; the table is not responding to expand actions, blocking the canonical triage path. Logging this as a critical blocker and ending the session to avoid burning the remaining turn budget on the same stuck state.

findings.summary: Lab table expand action does not advance triage workflow after chat unfocus
findings.evidence: Turns 6-8: sent escape keypress to unfocus chat, then issued two expand actions targeting the first lab. Screen still shows Director Chat panel focused with empty lab table region visible on the right; no lab row expanded, no auto-switch to lab agent chat occurred. Workflow cannot reach step 4 (read lab agent view) or step 5 (promote).

findings.summary: No visible feedback distinguishing focused vs unfocused chat panel
findings.evidence: After escape keypress on turn 6, screen header still reads 'Director Chat — Chief of Staff' with no clear indication whether focus moved to the lab table. Examiner had to guess whether subsequent expand actions would target the table or be swallowed by chat.

findings.summary: Expand action with lab_id appears to be a no-op when chat panel retains focus
findings.evidence: Two expand actions issued on turns 7 and 8 produced identical screen state — Director Chat panel still dominant, lab list region on right showing the same '5 labs' summary line with no row expansion visible. Expand should either succeed or surface an error; silent no-op is a discoverability failure.

workflow_judgment.reasoning: The persona attempted step 1 (asking the chief what needs attention) repeatedly across 5 turns but never received an actionable recommendation, so step 2 (identifying the highest-priority lab) was not achieved. Subsequent expand attempts failed — the table never visibly expanded — so steps 3-6 (read lab agent view, promote claw, verify decision) were never executed. No decision.json artifact was written. The run terminated after the persona declared the workflow blocked by an unresponsive chief and a non-progressing expand action — both legitimate findings but a clear workflow failure.
